cmd: mkdir -p .agentic; printf '%s' '{"grill":{"enabled":true,"deep":true,"agent_judgment":false}}' > .agentic/config.json; out=$(jq -r '[(.grill.enabled // false), (.grill.deep // false)] | join(" ")' .agentic/config.json 2>/dev/null || echo "false false"); [ "$out" = "true true" ] && echo '{"parsed":"'"$out"'"}'
_note: the exact command skills/spec/SKILL.md prescribes for reading grill enabled+deep must parse both flags from a full config entry
